project_id.description: Asana project GID (13+ digit numeric ID)

rules.name: project_id_format
rules.description: Project ID must be valid Asana GID
rules.message: Invalid Asana project GID format. Must be 13+ digit numeric ID.
rules.remediation: Use asana_search_projects to find valid project GID

rules.name: html_notes_tags
rules.description: Only specific HTML tags allowed in Asana
rules.message: Asana only supports specific HTML tags: body, h1, h2, ol, ul, li, strong, em, u, s, code, pre, blockquote, a, hr, img, table, tr, td
rules.remediation: Remove unsupported HTML tags or use plain text notes

task_id.description: Asana task GID (13+ digit numeric ID)

rules.name: task_id_required
rules.description: Task ID must be provided for updates
rules.message: task_id is required for task updates
rules.remediation: Provide valid task_id from task creation or search

rules.name: workspace_required
rules.description: Workspace is required for task search
rules.message: workspace parameter is required for task search
rules.remediation: Use asana_list_workspaces to get workspace GID

rules.name: sections_any_requires_project_filter
rules.description: sections_any is workspace-scoped, not project-scoped
rules.message: GOTCHA: sections_any returns tasks from ALL projects in the workspace, not just the intended project. Add projects_any or post-filter with AsanaProjectFilter.
rules.remediation: Add projects_any parameter or use AsanaProjectFilter.filterByProject()

rules.name: limit_recommended
rules.description: Queries should include limit to prevent large result sets
rules.warning: Query without limit may return large result set
rules.remediation: Add limit parameter to control result size

rules.name: values_required
rules.description: Insert requires values object
rules.message: values parameter is required for insert operations
rules.remediation: Provide values object with column:value pairs

rules.name: filter_required_for_update
rules.description: Updates require filter to prevent accidental full-table update
rules.message: filter parameter is required for update operations to prevent full-table updates
rules.remediation: Add filter parameter to specify which rows to update

rules.name: service_role_for_rls
rules.description: Updates may require service role key for RLS bypass
rules.warning: This table has RLS policies. Updates may fail with anon key.
rules.remediation: Ensure SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is configured for write operations

url.description: URL must start with http:// or https://

rules.name: valid_url_required
rules.description: URL must be valid HTTP/HTTPS URL
rules.message: Invalid URL format. Must start with http:// or https://
rules.remediation: Provide valid URL with protocol

rules.name: salesforce_login_detection
rules.description: Salesforce URLs may require authentication
rules.warning: Salesforce navigation may require prior authentication via sf CLI
rules.remediation: Ensure org is authenticated with 'sf org login' before browser navigation

mcp__sequential_thinking__think.description: Sequential thinking MCP for complex reasoning

rules.name: thought_required
rules.description: Thought content is required
rules.remediation: Provide thought content for sequential reasoning

mcp__asana__asana_get_task.description: Get detailed task information from Asana

task_id.description: Asana task GID (13+ digit numeric ID)

mcp__asana__asana_create_subtask.description: Create a subtask under an existing task

mcp__asana__asana_get_project.description: Get detailed project information from Asana

mcp__asana__asana_create_task_story.description: Add a comment/story to an Asana task

rules.name: text_not_empty
rules.description: Comment text must not be empty
rules.remediation: Provide meaningful comment text

rules.name: filter_required_for_delete
rules.description: Deletes MUST have filter to prevent accidental full-table deletion
rules.message: DANGEROUS: filter parameter is REQUIRED for delete operations. Deletes without filter will remove ALL rows!
rules.remediation: Always provide filter parameter to specify which rows to delete

rules.name: service_role_for_delete
rules.description: Deletes typically require service role key
rules.warning: Delete operations may require SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY due to RLS policies
rules.remediation: Ensure service role key is configured for delete operations

mcp__supabase__upsert.description: Supabase database upsert (insert or update) via MCP

rules.name: on_conflict_recommended
rules.description: Upserts should specify conflict resolution
rules.warning: Upsert without on_conflict will use default primary key for conflict detection
rules.remediation: Specify on_conflict parameter for explicit conflict handling

rules.name: function_name_required
rules.description: Function name must be provided
rules.message: Function name (fn) is required for RPC calls
rules.remediation: Provide the name of the Supabase function to call

mcp__playwright__browser_click.description: Click an element on the page

rules.name: element_selector_required
rules.description: Element selector or ref must be provided
rules.message: Element selector is required for click operations
rules.remediation: Provide element selector (CSS, text, or accessibility selector)

mcp__playwright__browser_snapshot.description: Capture accessibility snapshot of current page

mcp__playwright__browser_type.description: Type text into a focused element

rules.name: text_required
rules.description: Text to type must be provided
rules.message: text parameter is required for type operations
rules.remediation: Provide the text to type

mcp__playwright__browser_wait.description: Wait for specified duration or condition

rules.name: reasonable_wait_time
rules.description: Wait time should be reasonable
rules.warning: Wait time exceeds 30 seconds. Consider using selector-based waiting instead.
rules.remediation: Use selector parameter to wait for specific element instead of fixed time
